━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ ChatClientAgentRunOptions (for each RunAsync call)
   new ChatClientAgentRunOptions(ChatOptions chatOptions)
   
   Properties:
   • ChatOptions - Full chat configuration (see below)
   • Inherits: AllowBackgroundResponses, ContinuationToken, ResponseFormat

✅ ChatOptions (from Microsoft.Extensions.AI)
   Key Properties:
   • Temperature (0.0-2.0) - Randomness
   • MaxOutputTokens - Response limit
   • TopP, TopK - Sampling strategies
   • Instructions - Per-request system prompt override
   • Tools - Available tools for this call (List<AITool>)
   • ToolMode - auto, required, none
   • AllowMultipleToolCalls - Parallel function calls
   • ModelId - Model selection
   • ResponseFormat - text, json, etc.
   • ConversationId - Track conversations
   • AllowBackgroundResponses - Async operations
   • ContinuationToken - Resume polling
   
✅ AgentRunOptions (base class)
   Properties:
   • AllowBackgroundResponses - Enable long-running ops
   • ContinuationToken - For polling results
   • ResponseFormat - Response format
   • AdditionalProperties - Custom data

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ AgentResponse (from RunAsync)
   Properties:
   • Messages: IReadOnlyList<ChatMessage> - All response messages
   • Text: string - Concatenated text of all messages
   • RawRepresentation: object - Native response format
   • ContinuationToken: string - For background polling
   • Usage: UsageDetails - Token counts

✅ AgentResponseUpdate (from RunStreamingAsync)
   Properties:
   • Content: object - Incremental content
   • ContinuationToken: string - Current position
   • Messages/Usage info

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

       name: "search",
       description: "...",
       serializerOptions: jsonOptions)

       session, 
       jsonSerializerOptions,
       cancellationToken)

✅ Deserialize (restore):

       jsonElement,
       jsonSerializerOptions,
       cancellationToken)

✅ Reuse session:
   // Session maintains history automatically
   await agent.RunAsync("Q1", session, options, ct);
   await agent.RunAsync("Q2", session, options, ct);

   • TopP, TopK - Sampling strategies
   • Instructions - Per-request system prompt override
   • Tools - Available tools for this call (List<AITool>)
   • ToolMode - auto, required, none
   • AllowMultipleToolCalls - Parallel function calls
   • ModelId - Model selection
   • ResponseFormat - text, json, etc.
   • ConversationId - Track conversations
   • AllowBackgroundResponses - Async operations
   • ContinuationToken - Resume polling
   
✅ AgentRunOptions (base class)
   Properties:
   • AllowBackgroundResponses - Enable long-running ops
   • ContinuationToken - For polling results
   • ResponseFormat - Response format
   • AdditionalProperties - Custom data

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
4️⃣  RESPONSE TYPES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ AgentResponse (from RunAsync)
   Properties:
   • Messages: IReadOnlyList<ChatMessage> - All response messages
   • Text: string - Concatenated text of all messages
   • RawRepresentation: object - Native response format
   • ContinuationToken: string - For background polling
   • Usage: UsageDetails - Token counts

✅ AgentResponseUpdate (from RunStreamingAsync)
   Properties:
   • Content: object - Incremental content
   • ContinuationToken: string - Current position
   • Messages/Usage info

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
5️⃣  TOOLS & FUNCTIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ AIFunctionFactory.Create() - Create callable tools
   
   Overload 1 - From Delegate:
   AIFunctionFactory.Create(
       (string query) => Search(query),
       new AIFunctionFactoryOptions { Description = "..." })
   
   Overload 2 - From MethodInfo:
   AIFunctionFactory.Create(
       typeof(Service).GetMethod("Search"),
       serviceInstance,
       name: "search",
       description: "...",
       serializerOptions: jsonOptions)
   
   Overload 3 - From MethodInfo with resolver:
   AIFunctionFactory.Create(
       method,
       (args) => GetService(args),
       options)

✅ AITool (manual tool definition)
   new AITool {
       Name = "tool_name",
       Description = "What it does"
   }

✅ AIFunction (executable tool)
   Returned by AIFunctionFactory.Create()
   Task<object> InvokeAsync(
       AIFunctionArguments arguments,
       CancellationToken ct)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
6️⃣  SESSION MANAGEMENT (AgentSession)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Create session:
   var session = await agent.CreateSessionAsync(cancellationToken)

✅ Serialize (persist):
   var json = await agent.SerializeSessionAsync(
       session, 
       jsonSerializerOptions,
       cancellationToken)

✅ Deserialize (restore):
   var restored = await agent.DeserializeSessionAsync(
       jsonElement,
       jsonSerializerOptions,
       cancellationToken)

✅ Reuse session:
   // Session maintains history automatically
   await agent.RunAsync("Q1", session, options, ct);
   await agent.RunAsync("Q2", session, options, ct);

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
7️⃣  AGENT BUILDER (AIAgentBuilder)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Create decorator pipeline:
   var decorated = new AIAgentBuilder(chatClientAgent)
       .UseOpenTelemetry()           // Add monitoring
       .UseLogging()                 // Add logging
       .UseFunctionInvocation()      // Auto-invoke functions
       .Build(serviceProvider);

✅ Or use extension:
   var builder = chatClientAgent.AsBuilder()
       .UseOpenTelemetry()
       .Build(serviceProvider);

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
8️⃣  CHAT MESSAGE TYPES (Microsoft.Extensions.AI)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ ChatMessage
   new ChatMessage(ChatRole.User, "What is AI?")
   new ChatMessage(ChatRole.Assistant, "AI is...")
   new ChatMessage(ChatRole.System, "You are helpful")
   new ChatMessage(ChatRole.Tool, "Result: ...")

✅ ChatRole (static properties)
   ChatRole.User       - User input
   ChatRole.Assistant  - LLM response
   ChatRole.System     - Instructions
   ChatRole.Tool       - Tool execution result

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
9️⃣  IChatClient INTERFACE (underlying LLM client)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ GetResponseAsync()
   Task<ChatResponse> GetResponseAsync(
       IEnumerable<ChatMessage> messages,
       ChatOptions options,
       CancellationToken ct)

✅ GetStreamingResponseAsync()
   IAsyncEnumerable<ChatResponseUpdate> GetStreamingResponseAsync(
       IEnumerable<ChatMessage> messages,
       ChatOptions options,
       CancellationToken ct)

data.content:
Perfect! Let me provide a final consolidated summary:

## Summary

I've completed a comprehensive analysis of the **Microsoft.Agents.AI NuGet package** public API surface. Here are the key findings:

### **Main Agent Class**
- **`ChatClientAgent`** (namespace: `Microsoft.Agents.AI`)
  - Inherits from abstract `AIAgent` class
  - Delegates to an `IChatClient` implementation (the actual LLM)
  - Constructors accept: chatClient, instructions, name, description, tools, loggers, service provider

### **Invoke Methods**
All async, three variants:

1. **`RunAsync(...)`** – Non-streaming (returns full `AgentResponse`)
   - Parameters: message (string/ChatMessage/IEnumerable), session, options, cancellationToken
   - Returns: `Task<AgentResponse>`

2. **`RunStreamingAsync(...)`** – Streaming (real-time updates)
   - Same parameters
   - Returns: `IAsyncEnumerable<AgentResponseUpdate>`

3. **`RunAsync<T>(...)`** – Typed response
   - Returns: `Task<AgentResponse<T>>` (deserialized to type T)

### **AgentInvokeOptions (actually ChatClientAgentRunOptions)**
**Namespace:** `Microsoft.Agents.AI`
- Contains `ChatOptions` property (merged with agent defaults)
- Inherits: `AllowBackgroundResponses`, `ContinuationToken`, `ResponseFormat`

### **ChatOptions (from Microsoft.Extensions.AI)**
Comprehensive configuration object with properties:
- `Temperature`, `TopP`, `TopK` – Sampling controls
- `MaxOutputTokens` – Response limit
- `Instructions` – Per-request system prompt
- `Tools` (List<AITool>) – Available functions
- `ToolMode` – auto/required/none
- `ResponseFormat` – text/json/etc.
- `AllowBackgroundResponses`, `ContinuationToken` – Async operations

### **Tool Creation with AIFunctionFactory**
**Namespace:** `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`

Multiple `Create()` overloads:
```csharp
// From delegate
AIFunctionFactory.Create(
    (string q) => Search(q),
    new AIFunctionFactoryOptions { Description = "..." })

// From MethodInfo
AIFunctionFactory.Create(
    method,
    instance,
    "name", "description", jsonOptions)

// From MethodInfo + resolver
AIFunctionFactory.Create(
    method,
    (args) => GetInstance(args),
    options)
```

### **Response Types**
- **`AgentResponse`** – Messages, Text, ContinuationToken, Usage
- **`AgentResponseUpdate`** – For streaming (Content, ContinuationToken)
- **`ChatMessage`** – Role + Content
- **`ChatRole`** – System, Assistant, User, Tool

### **Session Management (AgentSession)**
- `CreateSessionAsync()` – New conversation
- `SerializeSessionAsync()` – Persist state
- `DeserializeSessionAsync()` – Restore state
- Sessions maintain history automatically across multiple `RunAsync` calls

### **Agent Builder (AIAgentBuilder)**
Decorator pattern for chaining:
```csharp
new AIAgentBuilder(chatClientAgent)
    .UseOpenTelemetry()
    .UseLogging()
    .Build(serviceProvider)
```

### **Key Namespaces**
1. **`Microsoft.Agents.AI`** – ChatClientAgent, AIAgentBuilder, ChatClientAgentRunOptions
2. **`Microsoft.Agents.AI.Abstractions`** – AIAgent, AgentSession, AgentRunOptions, AgentResponse
3. **`Microsoft.Extensions.AI`** – IChatClient, ChatMessage, ChatOptions, AITool, AIFunction, AIFunctionFactory
4. **`Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Abstractions`** – Interface definitions

All XML documentation files are available in the NuGet cache at `/home/runner/.nuget/packages/` for the respective package versions (AI v1.0.0, Extensions.AI v10.4.1).
